hero.headline: Your Smile, Our Expertise
hero.description: Nicolas Navrozoglou and his team welcome you in a modern and warm setting in Forest, Brussels. Quality dental care, in the language of your choice.

generalDentistry.title: General Dentistry
generalDentistry.description: Routine check-ups, cleanings, fillings and preventive care to maintain your oral health.

endodontics.title: Endodontics
endodontics.description: Microscope-assisted root canal treatment. Nicolas Navrozoglou's specialty to save your natural teeth.

implants.title: Dental Implants
implants.description: Single implants, implant-supported bridges and All-on-4 solutions for missing teeth.

cosmetic.title: Cosmetic Dentistry
cosmetic.description: Veneers, bonding and smile design for a natural and harmonious result.

whitening.title: Teeth Whitening
whitening.description: Professional in-office whitening and take-home kits for a radiant smile.

pediatric.title: Pediatric Dentistry
pediatric.description: Dental care adapted to children in a reassuring and caring environment.

periodontics.title: Periodontics
periodontics.description: Gum disease treatment, deep cleaning and periodontal care.

orthodontics.title: Orthodontics
orthodontics.description: Invisible aligners, traditional braces and modern orthodontic solutions.

about.title: About Nicolas Navrozoglou
about.subtitle: Dedicated to excellence in dental care
about.bio: Graduated from ULB Brussels in 2015, Nicolas Navrozoglou specialized in endodontics. He practices at Clinique Dentaire Van Volxem in Forest, where he puts his expertise at the service of your dental health.
about.previewDescription: Graduated from ULB, Nicolas Navrozoglou specializes in endodontics and uses the most modern technologies.
about.clinicDescription: Clinique Dentaire Van Volxem features 8 treatment rooms equipped with the latest technologies, including 3D radiography (CBCT) for precise diagnostics.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: The latest techniques and technologies for optimal care.

care.title: Compassion
care.description: Patient comfort and well-being at the heart of our approach.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: Clear communication about treatments, alternatives and costs.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: Multilingual care (FR/NL/EN), centrally located and easily accessible.

items.name: Marie L.
items.quote: I was very afraid of the root canal treatment, but Nicolas Navrozoglou put me at ease from the very first moment. Professional and caring.

items.name: Thomas D.
items.quote: Excellent follow-up from start to finish. The result is perfect and natural. I highly recommend this clinic.

items.name: Sophie V.
items.quote: Impressive result in a single session. The team is very professional and the clinic is modern and welcoming.

items.name: Ahmed B.
items.quote: Very satisfied with the quality of care. Nicolas Navrozoglou takes the time to explain every step. Clean and well-equipped clinic.

cta.headline: Take Care of Your Smile
cta.description: Book an appointment online or call us for a consultation.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Don't hesitate to reach out for any questions or appointment requests.

info.title: Practical Information
info.transportValue: Tram 32, 82, 97 (Zaman-Forest National stop) • Train: Forest-East Station

items.question: How do I make an appointment?
items.answer: You can book an appointment online through our booking page or by calling us at 02 307 88 19.

items.question: Do you accept new patients?
items.answer: Yes, we welcome new patients. Book an appointment online or call us.

items.question: Which insurances do you accept?
items.answer: We accept all Belgian mutual insurance funds. Contact us for more information about reimbursement of your care.

items.question: What to do in case of a dental emergency?
items.answer: For emergencies during opening hours, call us immediately at 02 307 88 19. Outside hours, call 112.

items.question: Is root canal treatment painful?
items.answer: Thanks to modern techniques and local anesthesia, root canal treatment is painless. Nicolas Navrozoglou is a specialist in endodontics and ensures your comfort throughout the procedure.

items.question: Is teeth whitening safe?
items.answer: Professional in-office whitening is completely safe. We first evaluate your dental health to guarantee optimal results without side effects.

booking.title: Book an Appointment
booking.subtitle: Reserve your consultation in just a few clicks.

confirmation.title: Request Sent
confirmation.message: We have received your appointment request. We will contact you as soon as possible to confirm.
